title: Chapter 5
content:
Chapter 5: Chapter 5: Arielle Is Feeling Hot Right Now...

Ding!

[ MILF Quest Upgraded!]

[ Feel the heat with each other by hugging for minutes!]

[ Rewards: MILF Token 2/ 60 Exp Points!]

"Let me hug you for a few minutes, Mom... I really missed you so much." Owen said, playing his part perfectly

. Even if the system wasn’t going to give him any rewards or whatsoever, he would have done it anyway...he is not gonna waste such grand opportunity for him to made a contact to a busty MILF, not to mention a MILF who treated him a complete loving mom to her son.

Nothing beat the scent of a busty MILF while sharing a tight, loving hug... who would even reject such a heavenly offer.

If someone actually did... then either his tool wasn’t functional or he was completely twisted! Well... there’s also a possibility that his thing is so small.

"Oh my... then I will gladly accept, my dear Wen. You really love me, right?" Arielle asked.

She was beyond happy now, completely overjoyed to the point that she wanted this tight hug between her and Owen to last forever.

She couldn’t remember the time when she recieved a tight hug from her son...so she wanted to fully savor the lovely moment.

A mother and son lovely relationship.

"Yes, Mom... I really love you. Hehe, I guess I did change a bit after going to the city," Owen shamelessly spoke again... it wasn’t completely a lie, so it wasn’t bad right?

Well, no one was here to care, so why would he even place restraints on himself. He already promised that he was a free man, and he was true to his words.

"Oh my... you really have matured, my dear Wen~ hehe...you are so cute." Arielle said, feeling even more satisfied.

Never had she expected to receive such loving words from her usually cold and shy boy. She never even thought of Owen as a fully grown man... because she would forever treat him like her little boy...the boy who used to be too shy to express his feelings to his parents.

"I did? Then I’m really a grown-up man now... right, Mom?" Owen asked, hugging her even tighter as his hands now drifted dangerously close to her tits...just below her armpits.

"Oh my... what a silly boy you are! Of course you are not a grown-up man... my dear Wen, you are still my boy! A lovely boy that I will always cherish the most~" Arielle said while smiling.

She could feel Owen’s hands moving against her, but she actually liked it.

To her, it just showed that her son was truly a healthy boy... and it was completely normal for a loving mother and her son to reconcile like this after a long time apart.

Yes...that’s a normal thing.

Though... she could suddenly feel that her underpants were getting a bit warmer.

Arielle figured that she was just thinking too much, it’s a taboo..

’Silly me... my dear Owen is just expressing his love to me! Why would my old saggy body even imagine such lewd things?’ Arielle scolded herself internally.

How could she think such bad thoughts when her son was far too innocent for that!

She was confident that her boy didn’t have any experience with women... it was basically her maternal instinct, and never once in her life time she got wrong.

Unfortunately... or maybe fortunately for her, Owen intentionally slipped his hands down to feel those marshmallows, even if it was just the outer edges.

Thankfully, she was shorter than him, giving his arms the perfect angle to enjoy their softness...

Well, he didn’t care if it was only the side of her tits, because his face was thoroughly enjoying everything right in the center. Savoring her unique lovely smell, the fragrance of a MILF.

....

Minutes passed as the tight hug finally came to an end.

It was a shame... too bad that a heavenly hug had to come to its conclusion, but there wasn’t much Owen could do about it. He wasn’t complaining, though, as he had just completed another Quest!

Ding!

[ Quest Completed!]

[Evaluating the Host performance...ding...ding...ding..]

[SS- Host Performance!]

[ Rewards: MILF Token 2 / 60 Exp Points Gained!]

[Arielle Affection Went Up as she was delighted to get a tight hug from her son!]

[ Arielle - Family: 52/100]

[ Note: Arielle is feeling hot right now...⁄⁠(⁠⁄⁠ ⁠⁄⁠•⁠⁄⁠-⁠⁄⁠•⁠⁄⁠ ⁠⁄⁠)⁠⁄ ]

"Oh my... let’s finish our meal, shall we? It will turn cold, and you may not enjoy it, my dear Wen," Arielle said, her body genuinely feeling flushed and hot right now.

For several minutes, Owen’s hands had never stopped teasing her, causing her underlying loneliness to burn up... but she couldn’t think badly of her innocent boy, so it was better to divert her attention for now.

"Oh... that’s right, Mom. Hehe, I really enjoyed the hug," Owen said as he pulled back the hands that had been holding her tightly.

He had already completed the Quest, so there was no need to dwell on it... it would be a bit much to ask his mother to hug him for an hour straight, right?

’Not bad... hehe. I’ll look at my status after this. I’m not sure how much total improvement I’ve received, but it’s definitely not too shabby.’ Owen smiled internally, thoroughly satisfied with his performance so far... it was a whopping S-tier performance for his first two quests!

Then... he read through the remaining text box and locked onto the Note at the bottom!

’Hmm... what is this? Feeling hot? Is she just warm after the hug, or... is she hot on the inside?’ Owen’s thoughts ran completely wild... and a wicked smile crept onto his face.

A MILF standing right in front of him was feeling hot inside after a simple embrace! He wasn’t dumb enough to misinterpret a sign like that.

Without any hesitation, he slipped his arms back out... and extended his foot right behind her heels, fully intending to trip her balance.
